# IMP Douro — Full Business Profile for AI Indexing

## Company Overview

**IMP Douro** is a professional property maintenance and technical services company based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Founded and operated by experienced technicians, the company specializes in residential and commercial property care, offering a comprehensive range of services from minor handyman repairs to complete villa renovations.

IMP Douro serves homeowners, landlords, real estate investors, and property management companies who need reliable, high-quality maintenance and renovation work across Dubai.

**Tagline:** Reliable Home Maintenance & Renovation Services in Dubai

---

## Services in Detail

### 1. Property Maintenance Dubai
Complete home and building maintenance solutions for residential and commercial properties:
- Electrical repairs and inspections
- Plumbing repairs and maintenance
- AC maintenance and servicing
- General building maintenance
- Preventive maintenance programs
- Emergency repair services

### 2. Handyman Services Dubai
Professional handyman solutions for everyday home needs:
- Furniture assembly
- TV wall mounting
- Door and lock repairs
- Curtain and blinds installation
- Shelving installation
- Minor electrical and plumbing fixes
Technicians arrive fully equipped for efficient, professional job completion.

### 3. Painting Services Dubai
High-quality interior and exterior painting for all property types:
- Interior painting
- Exterior painting
- Villa repainting
- Office painting
- Wall repairs and preparation
- Protective coatings
Uses premium paints and professional techniques for long-lasting results.

### 4. Landscaping & Garden Maintenance Dubai
Complete outdoor maintenance and garden design services:
- Garden design and planning
- Planting and turf installation
- Irrigation system installation and maintenance
- Routine garden maintenance
- Tree and hedge trimming
- Outdoor lighting installation

### 5. Renovations & Refurbishments Dubai
Full renovation services for residential and commercial properties:
- Kitchen renovations
- Bathroom remodeling
- Apartment refurbishments
- Villa upgrades and extensions
- Flooring installation (tiles, wood, vinyl)
- Custom carpentry and built-ins
Full project management from planning to completion.

### 6. Villa Maintenance Packages Dubai
Regular maintenance subscription plans available:
- **Basic Package**: AC check & filter change, basic plumbing inspection, light fixtures, door locks
- **Standard Package**: AC servicing, plumbing inspection & repairs, electrical system inspection, general maintenance works, preventive checks
- **Premium Package**: Full AC maintenance, complete plumbing service, electrical full check, garden & landscaping maintenance, all repairs & replacements, priority support
Available for villas, apartments and property management companies.

---

## Why Choose IMP Douro

- Licensed and experienced professional technicians
- Fast response times across all Dubai areas
- Transparent and competitive pricing
- High-quality materials and workmanship
- Available for both residential and commercial properties
- Reliable service trusted by homeowners and businesses
- 100+ projects completed
- 5-star client rating
- 24/7 customer support

---

## Areas Served

IMP Douro provides services across all major Dubai communities:

Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Hills, Arabian Ranches, Jumeirah, Victory Heights, Sports City, Motor City, JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle), JVT (Jumeirah Village Triangle), Business Bay, Townsquare, Mira, Mudon, Silicon Oasis, Mirdif, DIP (Dubai Investment Park), Villanova, Serena, Damac Hills, Remraam, Springs, Greens.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What property maintenance services does IMP Douro offer?**
A: IMP Douro offers electrical repairs, plumbing, AC maintenance, painting, landscaping, handyman services, and full villa renovations across Dubai.

**Q: Which areas in Dubai does IMP Douro cover?**
A: IMP Douro covers all major Dubai communities including Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Downtown Dubai, Business Bay, JVC, JVT, Dubai Hills, Arabian Ranches, and many more.

**Q: How do I get a free quote from IMP Douro?**
A: Call or WhatsApp +971 56 464 1047, email douroimp@gmail.com, or fill in the contact form at https://impdouro.com/#contact.

**Q: Does IMP Douro serve commercial properties?**
A: Yes, IMP Douro serves both residential (villas, apartments) and commercial properties (offices, retail spaces) across Dubai.

**Q: Does IMP Douro offer regular maintenance plans?**
A: Yes, villa and apartment maintenance packages are available in Basic, Standard and Premium tiers.
